creator: craig001@lerwick.hopto.org
text:
Hello Folks

For some reason texlive-texmf is failing to install on a sparc64.  This is a bit of a show stopper as other ports depend on it for building.

I am not sure why it is not installing.

Log can be found at;
http://bsdtec.com/freebsd/texlive-texmf-20140525_3.log
